name: Zucchini Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz (1 cup) Cream of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and microwave zucchini, onion, and butter in a 2-quart casserole on high until vegetables are tender, 9 to 11 minutes.
2. Pour soup into blender container with 1 cup of water and zucchini mixture. Cover and blend on medium-high speed until smooth, about 1 minute.
3. Return the blended mixture to the casserole. Stir in the remaining 1 cup of water, salt, basil, and pepper. Cover and microwave on high until hot and bubbly, 8 to 10 minutes. (Can be refrigerated and served cold.)
